---
title: "Day 3: Advanced simulation experiments and critical integration"
---

## Program {.unnumbered}

- **Practical:** Executing simulation experiments with `gen3sis`.
- **Break**
- **Practical:** Analysing and interpreting simulation results; evaluating model strengths and limitations.
- **Lunch Break**
- **Practical:** Advanced scenarios and sensitivity analyses.
- **Break**
- **Lecture:** Critical synthesis—integrating ecological and evolutionary theories through computational modelling.
- **Group discussion:** Emerging questions, interdisciplinary collaboration, and future directions.
- **Student presentations:** Flash talks showcasing simulation experiments and theoretical integration.

## Core material used {.unnumbered}

- CBA advanced practicals and reflection:
  - [Day3_Prac6_sandbox.qmd](../ref/CBAGen3sis-main/Day3_Prac6_sandbox.qmd)
  - [considerations.qmd](../ref/CBAGen3sis-main/considerations.qmd)
  - [resources.qmd](../ref/CBAGen3sis-main/resources.qmd)
- YoMos advanced workflow and debugging:
  - [gen3sis_workshop.qmd](../ref/gen3sis_yomos_2024-main/gen3sis_workshop.qmd) (Section 5: Troubleshoot)
  - [myscript.R](../ref/gen3sis_yomos_2024-main/myscript.R)
- Day 3 configuration references:
  - [config_islands_Day3_ELH.R](../ref/CBAGen3sis-main/configs/config_islands_Day3_ELH.R)
  - [island_config_M0.R](../ref/CBAGen3sis-main/configs/island_config_M0.R)
  - [island_config_M2.R](../ref/CBAGen3sis-main/configs/island_config_M2.R)

## That's all folks {.unnumbered}

![](https://64.media.tumblr.com/f5436f265630043b4163b3b796436229/tumblr_nerv5zwzCr1sgl0ajo1_500.gif){fig-align="center" width="45%"}
